items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Semantics match q0159 ('on a mountain road increase safe distance'); French option B = 'Etendre la distance sécuritaire...' corresponds to q0159 correct.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: q0407's correct concept is 'section with heavy traffic flow' (overtaking prohibited). French option D ('lorsque la circulation est dense') matches that meaning despite option-order differences.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image + prompt match q0678; correct action is 'turn right' and French option B = 'tourner à droite'.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: q0115 concept: on a highway with full signs/markings, drive according to signs/markings. French option B = 'Les panneaux de signification et les marquages' matches that meaning (locale option-order differs from machine).

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image clearly shows a single straight-pointing guide arrow meaning 'go straight'. No existing top candidate unambiguously matches this specific localized wording/option set; recommend creating a new localized item with correct = D.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Sign in image appears to show '120' in a red circle (max speed), but prompt asks for minimum authorized speed; multiple candidate qids disagree (max vs min, numeric mismatches). Do not map without human review.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0656 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text asks what to do when a non-motorized vehicle wants to pass a stopped car; correct behaviour is to yield. q0120 directly matches ('yield to them') and French option B is the equivalent.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: The shown marking (white diamond-like mark) is used in candidate q0828 which labels it as a pedestrian-crossing warning in the question bank; French option A ('avertissement du passage pour piétons') matches q0828's meaning. There is some visual/terminology ambiguity, so confidence is moderate.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Ground numbers (e.g., 60/80) clearly indicate speed marking. q0708's correct meaning is 'speed limit' which corresponds to French option C ('limitation de vitesse'). Strong machine and visual agreement.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Top candidate q0832 indicates the marking is a 'stop line' (master correct = stop line) but none of the French options explicitly state 'stop line'. Source options don't contain the correct meaning, so cannot map reliably to an existing qid or select a locale answer. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher (q0832) meaning ('stop line') is not present among the source options; option-set mismatch prevents approval.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question asks what to do on main road approaching feeder road to prevent collisions — reduce speed/observe. q0140 matches and French option A is the equivalent of the master correct choice.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Triangular warning sign with deer = wildlife crossing. q0713 corresponds to 'watch for wildlife' and French option A matches that meaning. Strong visual and candidate agreement.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows an inflated front airbag; source options include seatbelt (A). Candidate q0595 asks same and has 'seat belt' as correct — mapping to source A.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks about re‑applying after license obtained by fraud; q0363/q0923 cover non‑reapplication period (3 years). q0363 explicitly matches this wording; source A = 3 ans.
Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Diagram shows a circled solid white line but mapping to the provided option set (stop/give way/slow/wait to turn) is ambiguous; no clear matching qid in candidates.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue 'P' sign with roof indicates indoor/covered parking. Candidate q0794 has 'indoor car park' as correct — source option C matches.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Blue mandatory left arrow sign — candidate q0755 corresponds to a left‑turn lane/left‑turn meaning. Source option D = 'tourner à gauche' matches q0755 correct meaning.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Two yellow broken center lines: intent ambiguous across candidate prompts (some deal with broken+solid, others different markings). Source option set and candidates conflict; cannot confidently map.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question about which toll gate to choose — candidate q0149 asks to select gate where green light is on. Source option D = 'Le feu vert s'allume' matches q0149 correct.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Prompt asks classification of driving act (disciplinary/contravention/infraction/crime). Image content and candidate matches do not provide clear legal classification mapping; cannot safely pick an existing qid.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image: yellow triangular sign with skidding car = slippery road. q0733 correct = 'slippery section' which maps to French option B 'chaussée particulièrement glissante'. Strong image+machine agreement.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image shows white dashed line on right lane (permits crossing/temporary use). No clear candidate qid in shortlist matches this exact road-mark meaning; recommend new question with correct answer French 'A'. Rejected top matcher: Top machine candidate(s) (indicator/dashboard items) are unrelated to road marking meaning; candidate set mismatch.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and options correspond to q0484 about taking turns when lanes reduce; machine correct option C maps to French 'C attendre dans sa voie...'.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows pedestrians on crosswalk; q0427 correct = 'stop and yield to pedestrians' (master option A) which corresponds to French option B 's'arrêter et laisser passer les piétons en premier'.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Triangular yellow sign with children figures = 'watch for children'. q0732 correct = 'watch for children' which maps to French option C 'attention aux enfants'.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Sign image: large white up arrow + small red down arrow (indicates YOU have priority over oncoming traffic). None of the French options express 'you have priority' (A and D state opposite meanings). Machine top candidate q0769 and option mappings are inconsistent with source options — options appear to be inverted or incorrect. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0769 and the source option set disagree: the visual semantics (white up arrow = priority for driver) are not represented in the provided French options, so cannot safely map to an existing qid.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image tags and visual notes show a blue rectangular sign with a T-intersection diagram; q0846 is the T-intersection item and the French option 'avertissement d'intersection en T' is option C.
